commands.review_summary:
Adds vault-level `totalPages`/`pageCounts` to Memory Wiki palace responses, normalizes the Control UI payload, and renders vault totals separately from selected-section metrics with tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows the backend omits vault totals and the UI renders the selected cluster headline, and the existing view test locks in the ambiguous text.
